qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the Open Composer application?
qa_pairs.answer: The Open Composer app provides a suite of Slurm job template scripts that can be submitted directly to the Trillium scheduler, and it also offers an interface to monitor submitted jobs via the History tab.

qa_pairs.question: How can users access the Open Composer application within the Open OnDemand portal?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can access Open Composer by navigating to the "Jobs" drop-down menu and selecting "Open Composer," or by clicking on one of the available Slurm job templates, such as "MPI Slurm Job," "OpenMP Slurm Job," or "Hybrid MPI/OpenMP Slurm Job."
